snackbar.failedToEnableSync: falló to enable Health Connect sync.
snackbar.failedToDisableSync: falló to disable Health Connect sync.
snackbar.syncDisabledMessage: Health Connect sync has been disabled.

healthConnect.sdkNotAvailable: Health Connect is not available on this device. Please install it from the Play Store.
healthConnect.permissionDenied: Health Connect permissions were denied. Please grant permissions to sync health datos.
healthConnect.permissionRevoked: Health Connect permissions were revoked. Please re-enable them in ajustes.
healthConnect.offline: No internet connection. Health datos will sync when you are back online.
healthConnect.syncConflict: Health datos conflict detected. Using most recent datos.
healthConnect.invalidValueRange: Invalid health datos value. Please check Tu input.
healthConnect.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
healthConnect.syncInProgress: Sync already in progreso. Please wait for it to complete.
healthConnect.unknownError: An error occurred while syncing health datos. Please try again.
